game_info.title: Curse of the Moon - JS Remake
game_info.concept:
Battle with swords and whips in this retro-style action game brought to you by game creator Koji Igarashi and Inti Creates! Play as Zangetsu, a demon slayer bearing a deep grudge, who must travel through perilous lands to defeat a powerful demon lurking in a dark castle. Steam URL: https://store.steampowered.com/app/838310/Bloodstained_Curse_of_the_Moon/ ================================================================================ Full Description: ================================================================================ Battle with swords and whips in this retro-style action game brought to you by game creator Koji Igarashi and Inti Creates! Play as Zangetsu, a demon slayer bearing a deep grudge, who must travel through perilous lands to defeat a powerful demon lurking in a dark castle. Battle with swords and whips in this retro-style action game brought to you by game creator Koji Igarashi and Inti Creates!

Play as Zangetsu, a demon slayer bearing a deep grudge, who must travel through perilous lands to defeat a powerful demon lurking in a dark castle. Zangetsu will meet fellow travelers along the way, who can join your journey as playable characters.

Switching to these characters with their unique abilities will unlock new paths through the treacherous stages. Your choices in recruiting these adventurers will change the difficulty of the game, and may even affect the ending!

*Bloodstained: Curse of the Moon is the 8-bit style game promised as a stretch goal of the 2015 Kickstarter campaign for "Bloodstained: Ritual of the Night."
game_info.description:
You are Zangetsu, a demon slayer bound by a curse, traveling through a dark, gothic castle to defeat the Archdemon Gremory.
Navigate treacherous platforms, avoid deadly traps, and battle nightmarish creatures using your sword and special abilities.
You are not alone—you can switch between allies Zangetsu (Swordsman) and Miriam (Whip Wielder) to utilize their unique strengths.
Zangetsu deals high damage with short range and high health. Miriam has longer reach, jumps higher, but takes more damage.
Defeat the boss at the end of the castle to lift the curse.
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left/Right: Move character
- Arrow Down: Crouch / Slide (if moving)
- Space: Jump
- Z: Attack
- Shift: Switch Character (Zangetsu ↔ Miriam)
- ESC: Pause Game
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over/Win screen)
- ENTER: Start Game

TEST_1.test_description: Verify basic movement physics and gravity interaction.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test will simulate holding the Right Arrow key to move the player, followed by the Space key to perform a jump. It monitors position updates.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player X position should increase. Player Y should decrease (jump) and then increase (gravity) until hitting the ground (velocity Y becomes 0).

TEST_2.test_description: Verify combat mechanics and enemy interaction.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Navigate the player towards the first enemy instance. Once within range, repeatedly simulate the 'Z' key (Attack) to deal damage.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The enemy's health should deplete to zero, the enemy should be removed from the entity list, and the score should increment.
TEST_2.description: Verify combat mechanics and enemy interaction.

TEST_3.strategy_description: Simulate pressing the Shift key. Monitor the `player.type` property and physics constants (jump force/speed).
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The player type should toggle between 'ZANGETSU' and 'MIRIAM', and the sprite/stats should update accordingly.

TEST_4.test_description: Verify Game Over (Win) condition by defeating the Boss.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Manipulate player position to the Boss room. Engage the boss with automated attacks while dodging (simulated or god mode for testing).
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Upon Boss death, the `gameState.gamePhase` should transition to "GAME_OVER_WIN".
TEST_4.description: Verify Game Over (Win) condition by defeating the Boss.

TEST_4.expected: Upon Boss death, the `gameState.gamePhase` should transition to "GAME_OVER_WIN".
